## Biography

The 63 G. Capricorni system briefly entered galactic attention in May 3302 through its association with the Diamond Frogs, a faction that operated from Skvortsov Orbital. Paramemetic, an independent commander who documented unusual phenomena, also maintained connections to the system, suggesting it served as a waypoint for pilots exploring the boundaries of conventional space.

Though lacking major strategic resources or a large population, the system's proximity to Eravate placed it within the broader sphere of activity surrounding one of the galaxy's busiest pilot hubs. Its brief period of mentions in GalNet records reflected how even minor systems could become relevant when aligned with emergent player-driven factions and independent explorers pushing into undercharted territory.
